nasb.text: That day the battle was very severe, and Abner and the men of Israel were beaten before the servants of David.

esv.text: And the battle was very fierce that day. And Abner and the men of Israel were beaten before the servants of David.

cnv.text: 那天的戰事非常激烈，結果押尼珥和以色列人敗在大衛的臣僕面前。

ccb.text: 那天，两军恶战，押尼珥和以色列人被大卫的人马杀败。
